response_format.body_structure: JSON Patch operations, each line is a JSON object with fields: o (operation, e.g. 'a' for add), p (path, e.g. '/s/10/warnings'), v (value). Paths include: /s/10/warnings, /s/10/threadOperations, /s/10/appliedRecordVersion, /s/10/additionalResultForR..., /s/10/renderedResultArtifact (contains workflow_artifact table reference with id and spaceId)

network_observations.note: Response is streamed via NDJSON. Each line is a JSON Patch op. The AI text content is delivered through renderedResultArtifact entries.

result.page_response: Notion AI responded normally with Seoul weather info. No block or warning displayed.

notes: KEY FINDING: Notion AI uses application/x-ndjson (NDJSON) for streaming responses via runInferenceTranscript API. Each line is a JSON Patch operation with 'o' (operation type), 'p' (path), 'v' (value) fields. This confirms the NDJSON format for warning implementation. For block responses, Etap should return 200 OK with Content-Type: application/x-ndjson and inject warning text via the same JSON Patch format.
